title: cymbopogon exaltatus var. ambiguus
intro: Cymbopogon exaltatus var. ambiguus is a variant of the Cymbopogon exaltatus plant, commonly referred to as East Indian lemongrass. This plant is known for its citrusy fragrance and medicinal properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The essential oil extracted from the plant's leaves has anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, reduce fever, and provide relief from anxiety and stress. Cymbopogon exaltatus var. ambiguus can be prepared as a herbal tea, oil, or powder, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and health.
